About.about_text_1: Hello! I'm an innovative Full Stack Engineer bridging the gap between Software excellence and AI innovation.
About.about_text_2: I excel in building scalable AI-powered web and mobile applications.

Projects.title: Selected Projects
Projects.subtitle: A showcase of my recent work bridging AI, DevOps, and Full Stack Development.

TechStack.title: Tech Stack
TechStack.subtitle: Technologies and tools I work with to build modern applications

Footer.quote: How can learning stop, when technology never does?

AskSection.title: Meet My AI Clone
AskSection.description: I’ve built a Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) system using my personal data. It’s fully aware of my experience, skills, and background. Ask it anything, and it will provide accurate insights tailored to me!
AskSection.placeholder: e.g. What is Firas's tech stack?

AboutData.about_text: Software Engineer with 3+ years of experience in full-stack development. Experienced in building scalable web & mobile applications using modern frameworks like React, Angular, React Native, and FastAPI. Strong DevOps mindset with containerization expertise (Docker) and CI/CD pipeline implementation. Passionate about integrating cutting-edge AI technologies including LLMs, RAG systems, and Model Context Protocol (MCP) into real-world applications.

details: Design and build scalable web & mobile AI-powered applications using React.js, React Native, Next.js, Node.js, and Python
Develop healthcare platforms focusing on patient care, medical data management, and digital health innovation
Integrate Generative AI solutions including chatbots, automated workflows, predictive analytics, and personalized recommendations
Architect intelligent systems combining LLMs with Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) for context-aware solutions
Designed and developed high-performance web and mobile applications with React, Angular, and React Native
Built scalable backend systems using Node.js and Spring Boot with MongoDB and SQL databases
Implemented CI/CD pipelines and containerization with Docker for efficient deployment across environments
Optimized database design and performance for both NoSQL and relational systems

experiences.role: Full Stack JavaScript Developer & MLOps Engineer
details: Developed intelligent healthcare mobile app connecting doctors, pharmacies, and patients for seamless communication and medication tracking
Built advanced ML models for disease prediction, achieving high diagnostic accuracy and supporting clinical decision-making
Created web-based disease prediction platform providing real-time insights for healthcare specialists
Implemented CI/CD pipelines automating development workflows with minimal downtime
Provided in-person university support courses for undergraduate computer science students
Taught core programming concepts including C Language, Java, and fundamental algorithms
Developed complete e-commerce platform using MEAN stack (Angular, Node.js, Express.js, MongoDB)
Implemented responsive frontend interfaces and scalable backend APIs
Containerized application using Docker for consistent deployment
Built hotel booking platform with React frontend and Node.js backend
Implemented database design using MongoDB and version control with GitHub
Ensured smooth user experience with robust functionality and responsive design

education.title: High School Diploma in Computer Science

nextalent-ats.title: NEXTALENT ATS - Smart Recruitment Platform
nextalent-ats.description: An advanced recruitment platform using smart embeddings (all-MiniLM-L6-v2) to match candidates with jobs precisely. RAG-powered chat lets recruiters explore CVs in real time.
features: Smart Embedding System extracting CV data
Advanced Scoring Engine combining pgvector and keyword overlap
Built-in RAG Assistant enabling real-time profile queries
Fully async backend architecture powered by FastAPI
Modern, responsive frontend built with Next.js 15
Context-aware AI utilizing Qwen2.5 via HuggingFace

ai-release-manager.title: Smart CI/CD Pipeline with AI-Powered MCP Release Gate
ai-release-manager.description: An AI-powered CI/CD release gate built with MCP architecture. It analyzes test results, code quality, and security metrics using Google Gemini AI.
features: AI-Powered Release Project evaluating tests and metrics
Uses Google Gemini AI to understand build risks
Generates APPROVE or BLOCK deployment decisions
Docker image building and production deployment

rag-assistant.title: Full-Stack AI Assistant: Web Scraping + RAG + LLM
rag-assistant.description: RAG Agent for Web Scraping & Question Answering using LangChain WebBaseLoader, ChromaDB with embeddings, and a modern React frontend.
features: Web scraping powered by LangChain WebBaseLoader
Clean, interactive UI built with React + TailwindCSS

github-assistant.title: AI-Powered GitHub Assistant with MCP + Llama
github-assistant.description: A GitHub AI Assistant that integrates directly with repositories. Features AI-powered code review, issue triage with auto-labeling, and works offline.
features: AI-Powered Code Review analyzing code for bugs
Suggests improvements for readability and best practices
Works offline with Llama running locally on LM Studio
Issue Triage fetching and summarizing repository issues
Auto-suggests labels to save maintainers time

eva-padel.title: EVA Padel – Real-Time Paddle Tournament & Player Tracking
eva-padel.description: A comprehensive app dedicated to paddle players, coaches, and clubs. Streamlines tournament management while providing performance tracking.
features: Player Evaluation system with coach reviews
Live Tournament Support with real-time scores
Personalized dashboards for players and coaches

pilate-co.title: Pilate & Co - Cross-Platform Mobile Application
pilate-co.description: A modern mobile application for Pilates enthusiasts with secure authentication, online class booking, subscription management, and social feed.
features: Social news feed for community interaction

delta-architect.title: Mobile Application - Delta Architect
delta-architect.description: A mobile application developed for Delta Cuisine architects to manage orders, track commands, stay updated with news, and access a loyalty system.
features: Seamless user experience built with React Native

ai-journal.title: AI-Powered Interactive Journaling RAG, Embeddings, Vector DB
ai-journal.description: A personal journaling app that lets users interact with their past entries using AI. Each journal entry is converted into embeddings and stored in Pinecone for semantic search.
features: Pinecone vector database for efficient search
Qwen LLM for natural language processing
Full-stack architecture with Expo frontend and NestJS backend

gym-assistant.title: AI-Powered Gym Assistant App using MCP
gym-assistant.description: A fitness app powered by AI that generates personalized workout plans while remembering and understanding the user over time using LLaMA 3 and MCP.
features: MCP Integration enriching AI prompts with context
LLaMA 3 Local Model running via LM Studio
Memory-driven coaching that adapts to user

face-verification.title: Face Verification & Liveness Detection System
face-verification.description: Secure biometric onboarding pipeline combining face verification and active liveness detection to prevent identity fraud.
features: Anti-spoofing protection against static images and replays
React Native frontend with live video streaming

emsat-platform.title: EMSAT Exam Simulation Platform
emsat-platform.description: A comprehensive full-stack e-learning platform simulating the standardized EMSAT exam environment with robust assessment mechanisms.
features: Advanced Student Dashboard for tracking progress

general-disease-prediction.title: Multi-Disease AI Prediction Platform
general-disease-prediction.description: Specialized healthcare web app utilizing an ensemble of machine learning models for early-stage risk assessment of conditions like COVID-19 and heart disease.
features: Critical Disease Screening for Heart Disease, Diabetes, etc.
Probability scores for medical risk analysis

gitlab-ci-pipeline.title: Cloud-Native CI/CD Pipeline Architecture
gitlab-ci-pipeline.description: A robust, 100% cloud-based Continuous Integration and Deployment pipeline designed for high-availability healthcare applications.

mean-ecommerce.title: Full-Stack Digital Marketplace Architecture
mean-ecommerce.description: A high-performance e-commerce ecosystem built on the MEAN stack delivering a seamless shopping experience with robust backend management.

ChatWidget.welcome_subtitle: An AI assistant with access to my professional background, skills, and journey. Ask about my CV, LinkedIn, or projects.
